IServerSessionSetData Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Sets a value in the session's key-value store.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Session
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
void SetData(
	string key,
	string val
)

Parameters

key
Type: SystemString
val
Type: SystemString
Remarks
Note that data stored using this method is not tied to a specific application, and will not be cleared when logging out from any application. Changes must be committed by calling CommitAsync(CancellationToken).

Reference

IServerSession Interface
